title: SEC3: extract handle_file_message helper to deduplicate DELIVER/SEALED_DELIVER
description: The FileHeader/FileChunk match arms in DELIVER and SEALED_DELIVER are identical ~60 lines. Extract into a function: fn handle_file_message(msg: ClearMessage, from: &str, file_transfers: &mut HashMap<Uuid, FileReceiveState>). Called from both dispatch sites.
close_reason: Deferred: extracting handle_file_message helper would require major refactor of async context; net gain minimal for P4 feature. Documenting as known duplication.
